training_data: Pretrained on an unspecified corpus (initialized from pretrained chat model checkpoints), then supervised fine-tuned (SFT) on human-written and model-generated SFT data, and further aligned using Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) with over 1 million human preference comparisons (Meta reward modeling data).
training_compute: Custom training libraries, Meta’s Research SuperCluster, and production clusters for pretraining. Pretraining utilized a cumulative 3.3M GPU hours of computation on hardware of type A100-80GB (TDP of 350-400W).
license: Acceptable Use Policy and Licensing Agreement for Llama 2

training_data: Early version, before safety RLHF. Implies Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT).

Improved with safety RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback) using PPO (Proximal Policy Optimization). Training involved increasing proportion of safety data, with a sufficiently large amount of helpfulness training data.
Fine-tuned with varying percentages of safety data (0% to 100%)
